updates.name: Google Flow Unified Workspace
updates.description: Google merged Flow, Whisk, and ImageFX into a single AI creative workspace for generating, editing, and animating images and videos. Now powered by Nano Banana for image generation and Veo 3.1 for video, it's available free in 140+ countries.

updates.name: GPT-5.3 Instant
updates.description: OpenAI's latest ChatGPT model launched March 3 with dramatically less verbose responses, up to 26.8% fewer hallucinations, and faster inference. Finally answers your question without a three-paragraph preamble.

updates.name: Krisp AI Accent Conversion
updates.description: Real-time listener-side accent conversion that makes heavily accented speech easier to understand during calls and meetings, without changing the speaker's natural voice. A game-changer for global remote teams.

updates.name: Meta AI Shopping Assistant
updates.description: Meta is rolling out an AI shopping research feature inside its chatbot that serves product carousels with brand, price, and website info. Leverages data from 3.2 billion daily active users across Facebook and Instagram.

updates.name: Viktor AI Coworker
updates.description: An AI coworker that proactively executes tasks on your behalf rather than waiting for commands. Gained 323 upvotes on Product Hunt for its agentic approach to workplace productivity.

updates.name: Parsewise
updates.description: AI-powered document processing tool for handling large piles of documents. Featured in Product Hunt's March 5 newsletter for making bulk document analysis fast and painless.

updates.name: Qwen3.5 Small
updates.description: Alibaba's compact multimodal models (0.8B-9B parameters) offering native multimodal capabilities with significantly less compute. Top Product Hunt launch with 370 upvotes on March 3.

updates.name: Supa Social
updates.description: A self-hosted social media platform that gives you full control of your data. Featured in Product Hunt's March 5 newsletter as a privacy-first alternative to centralized social networks.

updates.name: ChatOn
updates.description: Multi-model AI chatbot that just hit 100 million downloads. Access GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Perplexity Sonar, and Claude 4.5 Sonnet under one subscription—the Swiss Army knife of AI chatbots.

updates.name: Deep Personality
updates.description: Science-backed personality insights tool for individuals and couples. Uses psychological frameworks to deliver actionable self-awareness. Hit 348 upvotes on Product Hunt on March 3.
